billingPeriod.description: Type of billing period to use.

dataCenter.description: Data center. For more information, check the documentation.
For more information, check the documentation.

DatabaseUserGrantCreationRequestDto.description: Parameters required to assign a user to a database.

password.description: The password to assign to a database user.

DatabaseUserPasswordRequestDto.description: Parameters required to update the password of an existing database user.

username.description: The username of the new database user.

password.description: The password to assign to the new database user.

DatabaseUserRequestDto.description: Parameters required to create a new database user.

DbaasExtendedRequestDto.description: Dto request Dbaas with extended properties for upselling.

dataCenter.description: For more information, check the documentation.
For more information, check the documentation.

id.description: Type of DB engine to activate. For more information, check the documentation.

name.description: Type of flavor to use. For more information, check the documentation.

uri.description: Uri of the resource to link

value.description: Value of the region in which the resource will be located. Available regions at present: - ITBG-Bergamo For more information, check the documentation.

LocationDto.description: Contains information about the Region of a resource

vpcUri.description:
The URI of the VPC resource to bind to this DBaaS instance.
Required when user has at least one VPC (with at least one subnet and a security group).

subnetUri.description:
The URI of the Subnet resource to bind to this DBaaS instance.
It must belong to the VPC defined in Aruba.CmpService.DatabaseProvider.Api.v1.Models.NetworkingRequestPropertiesDto.VpcUri
Required when user has at least one VPC (with at least one subnet and a security group).

securityGroupUri.description:
The URI of the SecurityGroup resource to bind to this DBaaS instance.
It must belong to the VPC defined in Aruba.CmpService.DatabaseProvider.Api.v1.Models.NetworkingRequestPropertiesDto.VpcUri
Required when user has at least one VPC (with at least one subnet and a security group).

elasticIpUri.description: The URI of the ElasticIp resource to bind to this DBaaS instance.

NetworkingRequestPropertiesDto.description: Dto containing the network information to use when creating the new DBaaS.

id.description: The Identifier of the platform engine.

type.description: Type of the platform engine like "mysql", "mssql" and so on.

PlatformEngineDto.description: Contract used to list the DBaaS engines the user can choose from.

dataCenter.description: For more information, check the documentation.
